topic: error analysis and verification of mean absolute deviation calculation
latex:
Your friend finds and interprets the mean absolute deviation of the data set 5, 7, 10, 9, and 6. Is your friend correct? Explain your reasoning.

\begin{tabular}{|l|}
\hline
$\text{Mean} = \dfrac{5 + 7 + 10 + 9 + 6}{5} = 7.4$ \\
\\
$\text{MAD} = \dfrac{2.4 + 0.4 + 2.6 + 1.6 + 1.4}{5} = 1.68$ \\
\\
So, the data values differ from the mean by \\
an average of 1.68. \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
